projectDescription: A multifunctional Mindustry server plugin providing player management, moderation, game modes, localization, and cross-server networking.
keyFeatures: Player statistics tracking with PvP ratings and Hexed progression
Comprehensive moderation system (ban, mute, votekick) with cross-server broadcast
Cross-server chat and networking via Redis streams
Unlockable player badges with admin management
Persistent private messaging with inbox, reply, and block flows
Configurable AI/LLM translation pipeline for multilingual servers
Multiple game modes: Hexed, PvP, Last Standing, Event
Discord integration for admin access and server linking
Ingress-based connection security (ban checks, rate limiting, whitelist)
Dependency injection via avaje-inject with exposed BeanScope for dependent plugins
publicApiSurface: Badge enum — ADMIN, DEVELOPER, TRANSLATOR, MAP_MAKER, CONTRIBUTOR, BUG_FINDER, EVENT_WINNER, VETERAN
HexedRanks.HexedRank enum — newbie, regular, advanced, veteran, davastator, the_legend
Config fields — server, playerLimit, disabledCommands, disabledFeatures, translation pipeline
GlobalConfig fields — mongoConnectionString, databaseName, translationProviders, vote settings
IngressCheck interface — pluggable connection verification checks
